steps.title: Identify the subject
steps.content: The subject of the sentence is Her exhaustive chromosomal survey — specifically the noun survey, which is singular. The intervening phrases describing the survey don't change its number.

steps.title: Match the verb to the singular subject
steps.content: Was is the singular form needed to agree with survey. The narrative context set in the 1970s also calls for past tense. The other three choices are all plural forms and cannot agree with a singular subject. That matches choice D — D is correct.
